'''habanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathercoat|feathercoat]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathercoat|feathercoat]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbængæth|hæbængæth]] || [[word:hæbængæj|hæbængæj]] || [[word:hæbængæsh|hæbængæsh]] || [[word:hæbængæ|hæbængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababangath|hababangath]] || [[word:hababangaj|hababangaj]] || [[word:hababangash|hababangash]] || [[word:hababanga|hababanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habangath|habangath]] || [[word:habangaj|habangaj]] || [[word:habangash|habangash]] || [[word:habanga|habanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habafngath|habafngath]] || [[word:habafngaj|habafngaj]] || [[word:habafngash|habafngash]] || [[word:habafngaf|habafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habangatha|habangatha]] || [[word:habangaja|habangaja]] || [[word:habangasha|habangasha]] || [[word:habangaka|habangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habangath|habangath]] || [[word:habangaj|habangaj]] || [[word:habangash|habangash]] || [[word:habanga|habanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habangathal|habangathal]] || [[word:habangajal|habangajal]] || [[word:habangashal|habangashal]] || [[word:habangakal|habangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habangathatha|habangathatha]] || [[word:habangajaja|habangajaja]] || [[word:habangashasha|habangashasha]] || [[word:habangaka|habangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habangathan|habangathan]] || [[word:habangajan|habangajan]] || [[word:habangashan|habangashan]] || [[word:habangakan|habangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habangathaoro|habangathaoro]] || [[word:habangajaoro|habangajaoro]] || [[word:habangashaoro|habangashaoro]] || [[word:habangakaoro|habangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
